relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Heaven cries hallelujah for salvation and power.
Babylon's corrupting power is judged in truth.
Her smoke marks final collapse.
Elders and creatures answer amen.
All servants are called to praise.
Many waters thunder: the Almighty reigns.
The Lamb's wedding has come.
The bride wears the just acts of holy ones.
Blessed are those called to the Lamb's wedding supper.
Worship belongs to Divine; Jesus' witness is prophecy's spirit.
Heaven opens to the Faithful and True rider.
Fire-eyes and many crowns reveal hidden name.
He is clothed in life and called Word of Divine.
Heaven's armies follow in clean linen.
The mouth-sword judges nations.
He is King of kings and Lord of lords.
The other supper gathers birds of judgment.
All ranks of beastly power are exposed.
Beastly armies gather against the rider.
Beast and false prophet are seized.
The word-sword ends the beastly order.

contemplative_note: Revelation 19 contrasts two suppers: the Lamb's wedding feast and the collapse of beastly power. True conquest comes through faithful witness and the word from the mouth.
